title: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) Earnings: Latest Report, Earnings Call & Financials
text: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) latest earnings report with financial statements and earnings call information. Q1 2026 showed revenue of $34.4M with gross margin expansion to 34%. The company maintains a large cash position of $431.5M providing financial flexibility. Earnings call transcripts are available for detailed management commentary on operational performance and strategic initiatives.
